descriptionShort: Rick Boyd (Maine Mariners) vs. Matt Hervey (Moncton Hawks) AHL game footage from February 1990.
descriptionLong: Game footage from an AHL matchup on February 17, 1990, featuring Richmond Sockeyes alumni Rick Boyd playing for the Maine Mariners against Matt Hervey of the Moncton Hawks. Both players went on to professional careers after their time with the 1987 Centennial Cup-winning junior team.
